languages.text: {n}Однако, в этот раз воздействие будто бы слабее. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }Наушники{/d}, которые вам дала Ведка, делают свое дело.{/n}
{n}Yet this time, the influence seems weaker. The {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }earpiece{/d} Vedka gave you is doing its work.{/n}

languages.text: {n}但这一次，那影响似乎弱了些。薇德卡给你的{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }耳罩{/d}起了作用。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yine de bu sefer etki daha zayıf görünüyor. Vedka'nın sana verdiği {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }kulaklık{/d} işe yarıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cette fois, cependant, l'influence semble plus faible. L'{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }oreillette{/d} que Vedka vous a donnée fonctionne comme prévu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pero, esta vez, su influencia parece más débil. El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }dispositivo de Vedka{/d} parece funcionar.{/n}
